activated_rules.rule_name: Original certificate selected from certificate file; invoice taken from separate invoice file
Pairing validation passed via consignor and consignee identification in the invoice
Consignor identified explicitly in invoice text
Shipment weight in certificate verified against total weight in invoice
Specific EU member state and EU collective designation treated as verified

consignor.invoice_value:
Postal address
Volvo Truck Corporation
S-405 08 Göteborg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Document A contains an Original and a Copy; the Original certificate was used. The certificate consignor is 'VOLVO TRUCK CORPORATION ... Sweden'. The invoice explicitly contains 'Volvo Truck Corporation ... Sweden' in the postal-address block on page 1, and the name also appears elsewhere in the invoice material. Under rule 4.1.0 the consignor may be verified anywhere in the invoice documents. Country Sweden matches. Address-format differences do not prevent match under 4.1.5.

consignee.certificate_value:
MARUBENI DAGITIM VE SERVIS A.S
KUCUKBAKKALKOY MAH
KAYISDAGI CAD ALLIANZ PLAZA BLOK N1
34750 ISTANBUL
Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value:
Customer:
Marubeni Dagitim Ve Servis A.S
Kucukbakkalkoy Mah.
Kayisdagi Cad. Allianz Plaza Blok N
34750 ISTANBUL
Turkey
consignee.motivation: The certificate consignee company name is identified directly in the invoice customer block as 'Marubeni Dagitim Ve Servis A.S'. Country is shown as 'Türkiye' in the certificate and 'Turkey' in the invoice; this is acceptable country-name normalization under 4.2.3. Minor address differences, including 'N1' versus 'N', do not control the outcome under 4.2.4 because the company name and country are verified.

goods_description.certificate_value:
1 VOLVO FM42R RIGID TRUCK
VOLVO TRUCK CHASSIS NO:
551193
goods_description.invoice_value:
EURO 6 STANDARDS
VOLVO FM42R RIGID TRUCK
VOLVO TYPE : VTC3R MODEL YEAR :2026
FM-TRUCK 551193 / YV2XTW0A6TB551193
goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation in the certificate is 'VOLVO FM42R RIGID TRUCK'. That exact product designation appears in the invoice goods description. The certificate chassis number '551193' is also identifiable in the invoice line 'FM-TRUCK 551193 / YV2XTW0A6TB551193'. Additional invoice text such as 'EURO 6 STANDARDS', VIN and model-year data is supplementary and non-contradictory under 4.3.4.

quantity.motivation: The certificate quantity field explicitly states gross weight as 'GW/7147 KG', which satisfies the certificate-side requirement for weight category and unit. The invoice explicitly states 'WEIGHT: 7147 KG'. Under 4.4.4 a certificate shipment weight may be verified against a total weight shown in the invoice, and a difference in label wording does not itself create mismatch when the numeric value and unit are the same. The value 7147 KG matches exactly.

origin.motivation: The certificate origin field states 'The European Community, Belgium'. The invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: BELGIUM' and further contains text declaring the goods are of Belgian origin. Under 4.5.4.1 Belgium, as an EU member state, verifies the collective designation 'European Community'. Under 4.5.4.2 the specifically named country Belgium is also explicitly verified. No conflicting non-EU origin is introduced.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Document A was classified as the certificate file and Document B as the invoice file. The certificate file contains both Original and Copy; the Original certificate was used in accordance with the document-pairing rules. No LC reference was found, so normal control-point verification was applied. The consignor 'VOLVO TRUCK CORPORATION' is explicitly identifiable in the invoice, the consignee 'MARUBENI DAGITIM VE SERVIS A.S' is explicitly identifiable in the invoice customer block, the goods description 'VOLVO FM42R RIGID TRUCK' is explicitly present in the invoice, the certificate weight 'GW/7147 KG' matches the invoice weight '7147 KG', and the certificate origin 'The European Community, Belgium' is verified by the invoice's explicit Belgian origin statement with EU normalization. All applicable control points are MATCH; therefore the document pair is IDENTICAL and eligible for auto approval.
